title: Axis Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Axis Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
